features: Exfoliating Gloves for a Real Good Scrub - The Temple Spring carbonized rayon bamboo exfoliating glove deeply cleanses your skin, making it perfect as a body scrubber or back scrubber. Ideal for all skin types, it delivers a superior body care experience.

Natural Body Scrub with a Breathable Design - Unlike typical polyester options, our bamboo gloves combines the benefits of a bath sponge and a kessa glove, offering a breathable and effective body sponge alternative.

Thicker Texture for an Effective Exfoliating Body Scrub - These exfoliating gloves and exfoliating mitts feature a thicker texture that can boost circulation and rejuvenate your skin. Perfect for use as a loofah, body scrub exfoliator, or exfoliating sponge.

Energise and Unblock Pores - Use these shower scrubber tools to energise your body, unclog pores, and scrub away dirt. Ideal for a deep exfoliating body scrub, as a fake tan remover, or even a korean exfoliating mitt.

Durable and Versatile Exfoliator - Designed for long-lasting performance. These gloves are perfect to be used instead of or alongside your shower scrub, shower sponge, or kessa exfoliating glove. Use our loofa style gloves in confidence for a refreshing cleanse. *Please note packaging may vary from the images shown as we are re-branding. The products remain the same high quality*

Extra Large Exfoliating Gloves Temple Spring Video Merchant video Thicker Texture An Effective Exfoliating Body Scrub! These exfoliating gloves and exfoliating mitts feature a thicker texture that can boost circulation and rejuvenate your skin. Perfect for use as a loofah, body scrub exfoliator, or exfoliating sponge. Self-care does not get better than this. Exfoliate and Love Your Skin! Take the time to exfoliate and love your skin – these gloves are suitable for all skin types. They provide the perfect exfoliating texture. Exfoliation washes away dead surface cells while boosting circulation and encouraging skin cell rejuvenation for silky smooth & radiant skin. - Easy to put on and take off - Designed using natural Bamboo. - Excellent with soap, body scrubs, shower gels, or sea salts. - Easy to wash, machine washable, and dry quickly. Unclog pores and scrub away dirt. Energise Your Body! Energise and Unblock Pores - Use these shower scrubber tools to energise your body, unclog pores, and scrub away dirt. Ideal for a deep exfoliating body scrub, as a fake tan remover, or even a korean exfoliating mitt. What material are they made from? Temple Spring Exfoliating Gloves are made from 80% Viscose from Bamboo, 10% Spandex & 10% Polyester. Are they suitable for all skin types? Yes, but we don't recommend using them on sore or damaged skin areas. What size are they? Now available in 2 sizes. (M & XL) We recommend that those with larger hands try the XL size. However, as they are naturally stretchy Medium size will fit most hands. Wet them first as this makes them easier to put on. How long do they last? With the correct care: 1. Let them dry after each use 2. Don't wash over 40 degrees 3. Avoid jewellery and long nails. ..they should last several months. Where are they made? In the home of bamboo- China!
